stories.title: Tigers' Skubal to have surgery on left elbow
stories.summary: Tigers ace and two-time defending American League Cy Young Award winner Tarik Skubal will need surgery for loose bodies in his left elbow, manager A.J. Hinch said.

stories.title: Sources: Wolves expect Edwards to play Game 1
stories.summary: Timberwolves guard Anthony Edwards will play in Game 1 vs. the Spurs just nine days after hyperextending his knee.

stories.title: Source: Pack signing veteran Taylor as new QB2
stories.summary: Veteran quarterback Tyrod Taylor signed with the Packers and is expected to be the favorite to back up starter Jordan Love.

stories.title: Bulls hire Hawks exec Graham to head front office
stories.summary: The Bulls are hiring Hawks senior vice president Bryson Graham as the franchise's new executive vice president of basketball operations.

stories.title: Auriemma on spat with Staley: 'Just feel dumb'
stories.summary: UConn coach Geno Auriemma on Monday reflected on his heated postgame exchange with South Carolina coach Dawn Staley and said he feels "dumb for the way that it played out."
